notes:
## 1.5.5

- **Full app control on this phone** — every app is editable (including ones that look resting/gray). Soft tint no longer means “can’t tap.”
- **Always / Work / Learn / Fun / Never / Auto** — Always = all Steady profiles on this phone; Work/Learn/Fun = only that profile; Never = blocked with Ask from Home; Auto until you choose.
- Instant apply: Always unsuspends / Never suspends right away; picks stick after Refresh.
- Categories + Settings both use clear outlined chips (unselected never looks disabled).
